items.title: Lauren Coughlin rolls to Aramco win as Nelly Korda second again
items.dek: Lauren Coughlin rolled to a five-shot win over Nelly Korda and the rest of the star-studded field at the Aramco Championship for her first win in two years.
items.body: Lauren Coughlin rolled to a five-shot win over Nelly Korda and the rest of the star-studded field at the Aramco Championship for her first win in two years.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Luka to seek specialized treatment in Europe
items.dek: Luka Doncic will seek specialized treatment on his Grade 2 left hamstring strain in an attempt to expedite his return to play, his agent said.
items.body: Luka Doncic will seek specialized treatment on his Grade 2 left hamstring strain in an attempt to expedite his return to play, his agent said.
items.author: IriLine Desk
